sentences.arabic: الْمَشْيُ نَشَاطٌ بَدَنِيٌّ مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا لِلْجِسْمِ.
sentences.translation: Hodanje je veoma važna fizička aktivnost za tijelo.
sentences.translationEn: Walking is a very important physical activity for the body.

sentences.arabic: أَمْشِي لِمُدَّةِ ثَلَاثِينَ دَقِيقَةً كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ الْعَامَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Šetam trideset minuta svako jutro u javnom parku.
sentences.translationEn: I walk for thirty minutes every morning in the public park.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْعَادَةُ تُسَاعِدُنِي عَلَى الشُّعُورِ بِالنَّشَاطِ وَالسَّعَادَةِ طَوَالَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Ova navika mi pomaže da se osjećam energično i sretno tokom cijelog dana.
sentences.translationEn: This habit helps me feel energetic and happy all day long.
